kodim03.png: Top-left: neon yellow cap, "Bahamas" script, shadowed. Rightward: orange, green, pink, blue caps, same script, aligned diagonally on wood. Sky background, clouds, strong sunlight, high contrast, photograph style.
kodim04.png: Red woven sunhat with wide brim, netting veil over neck. Blonde bangs, blue eyes, red lipstick. White-and-black beaded necklace. Pink satin drapery background. Photorealistic portrait, soft lighting, frontal view, high detail skin texture.
kodim01.png: Two-story stone building, white-painted brick facade. Six windows: upper row four (two open shutters), lower row two (one open). Central red door with diagonal brace. Red shutters on all windows. Green weeds at base. Flat lighting, muted tones, photograph style.
kodim02.png: Red wooden door, weathered paint, vertical planks. Horizontal metal latch with white round knob. Diagonal red brace. Keyhole below latch. Rusty hinges, chipped paint, grain texture. Photorealistic, high-detail close-up.
kodim05.png: Top to bottom, left to right: six motocross riders crouched on bikes, helmets with logos (Smith, Motul, Suzuki), colorful bikes (green, yellow, red, white), knobby tires aligned diagonally. Dirt track, overcast lighting, photo realism, dynamic race-start pose, consistent perspective and branding.
kodim06.png: Wooden sailboat with mast, rigging, and "SENTIME" text, floating on turquoise water. Shoreline with trees and small buildings in background. Warm golden-hour lighting, slightly faded film-style color tone. Boat tilted slightly left; calm sea ripples.
kodim08.png: Row of half-timbered houses, left to right: beige, green, yellow, red-white. Steep gabled roofs, brown tiles, some snow patches. Dark shutters, white windows. Vineyard hill in background. Photorealistic, daylight, clear shadows.
kodim07.png: Top: arched white stone window frame, teal louvered shutters. Center: pink hibiscus with yellow stamen, green leaves. Right: red hibiscus, green foliage. Background: pale wall. Style: photograph. Lighting: soft daylight. Colors: muted pastels, vibrant flowers.
kodim09.png: Top: overcast sky. Center: multiple sailboats on choppy water, sails white with colored bands (blue, yellow, red, pink), numbers like "14255". Foreground boat: crew in yellow and blue jackets. Background: distant treeline. Style: color photograph, natural lighting, dynamic motion.
kodim10.png: Top-left: white sail with blue numbers "22432 63455", blue horizontal stripe. Below: two sailors (blue/red jackets) on dark-hulled sailboat "René". Right: second sailboat, green "20042", pink flag. Choppy water, bright daylight, photographic style.
kodim11.png: Rusted metal pier structure, broken central section. Small weathered sailboat moored beside it, white hull, red tarp, torn sails. Turquoise water, calm surface. Distant horizon, gray sky. Photograph style, natural lighting, high detail, realistic decay.
kodim12.png: Top: sky with soft clouds; middle: woman (left, red/purple/green swimsuit, pink fins), man (right, red shorts, yellow fins), holding hands, wading in shallow turquoise water; right: sandy beach, green trees, distant white vehicle; warm, faded film aesthetic.
kodim13.png: Mountain range with snow-capped peaks, dense evergreen forest slopes, rocky riverbed, fast-flowing clear stream with white rapids, scattered boulders and driftwood, green shrubs along banks, partly cloudy sky. Natural landscape photograph.
kodim14.png: Yellow inflatable raft with "SNOWMASS WHITEWATER" text, eight people in red life vests paddling turbulent brown river. Rocks visible upstream. Bright daylight, high contrast, photographic style. Raft centered, occupants arranged front to back, oars angled, water splashing.
kodim15.png: Child's face, left-side close-up. Face paint: yellow circle around left eye, blue/white/red sunburst rays, white dots. Dark curly hair with yellow/blue ribbons. Red/green/yellow knit sweater. Beaded necklace. Soft lighting, studio portrait, high color saturation.
kodim18.png: Top: abstract black metal sculpture with sharp angular forms. Left: rusted, textured metallic base. Center: woman in dark long-sleeve dress, layered pearl necklaces, red lips, straight hair. Background: green foliage, grassy ground. Style: color photograph, natural lighting, outdoor setting.
kodim17.png: Top: person with white-painted face, curly hair, golden leaf crown with pearls. Mid: draped white fabric robe, hands holding large crinkled gold sphere. Background: blurred stone wall, soft shadows. Style: staged photograph, high-contrast lighting, classical statue aesthetic.
kodim20.png: P-51 Mustang fighter plane on grass field. Yellow nose, black propeller tips, silver fuselage with "SHE-SHOOTER" nose art and cartoon mascot. Black-and-white invasion stripes on wings/tail. Landing gear down. Soft golden-hour lighting. Photorealistic photograph.
kodim16.png: Top: large cumulus clouds, white with gray undersides, against pale blue sky. Middle: narrow tropical island with green vegetation, line of tall palm trees, sandy shore. Bottom: rippling dark teal water, gentle waves, slight vignette. Style: vintage photograph, warm tone, soft focus.
kodim19.png: White conical lighthouse with black lantern room, adjacent white clapboard buildings, white picket fence, orange life ring on fence post, coin-operated binoculars on concrete pad, grassy foreground, cloudy sky.
kodim21.png: White conical lighthouse with black lantern room, red-roofed keeper's house left, smaller red-roofed building right. Jagged gray rocks foreground, white waves crashing. Blue sky, scattered clouds. Photorealistic photograph.
kodim23.png: Left: blue-and-yellow macaw, green crown, white face patch, black beak, yellow chest, blue wings. Right: scarlet macaw, red head/body, white face patch, black beak, green/blue wing feathers. Both in profile, facing left. Soft green bokeh background. Natural lighting, photograph style.
kodim24.png: Alpine house with red-tiled roof, green shutters, ornate frescoes (sun, angels, hunters, wolves), balcony with flowers, stone pillars, wooden fence, mountain backdrop. Frescoes detailed, colorful; natural lighting; folk-art style; structurally sound, semantically coherent rural dwelling.
kodim22.png: Red barn with gambrel roof, cupola, white trim; attached smaller shed. Green trees left and right. Dark storm clouds above. Calm pond reflects barn. Foreground: tall green grass. Style: realistic photograph. Lighting: dramatic, side-lit, high contrast.
